expectations.text: Folder structure follows App Shell pattern with components/shell/, features/, contexts/, hooks/, lib/
expectations.evidence: Found all required directories: src/components/shell/ (AppShell.tsx, BottomNav.tsx, Header.tsx, Skeleton.tsx), src/features/ (timer/, mood/, tasks/, chat/, profile/), src/contexts/ (AppProvider.tsx), src/hooks/ (usePersistedState.ts, useOfflineStatus.ts), src/lib/ (constants.ts, storage.ts). Also includes components/ui/ and components/shared/.

expectations.text: tailwind.config contains Colibri color tokens (colibri-bg #121214, colibri-primary #7C3AED, colibri-surface #1A1A1E)
expectations.evidence: tailwind.config.js defines colibri.bg: '#121214', colibri.primary: '#7C3AED', colibri.surface: '#1A1A1E' — all three exact values present under theme.extend.colors.colibri.

expectations.text: vite.config.ts includes VitePWA plugin with manifest and workbox runtimeCaching
expectations.evidence: vite.config.ts imports VitePWA from 'vite-plugin-pwa' and configures it with: manifest (name, short_name, icons, theme_color, etc.), workbox.runtimeCaching with StaleWhileRevalidate handler for API calls, and workbox.globPatterns.

expectations.text: All feature routes use React.lazy() with Suspense fallback
expectations.evidence: App.tsx imports all 5 pages via lazy(): const TimerPage = lazy(() => import('./features/timer/TimerPage')), MoodPage, TasksPage, ChatPage, ProfilePage. All routes wrapped in <Suspense fallback={<Skeleton />}>.

expectations.text: BottomNav has exactly 5 navigation items (Timer, Humor, Tarefas, Chat, Perfil)
expectations.evidence: components/shell/BottomNav.tsx defines NAV_ITEMS array with exactly 5 items: {label:'Timer'}, {label:'Humor'}, {label:'Tarefas'}, {label:'Chat'}, {label:'Perfil'}.

expectations.text: Project builds successfully without errors (npm run build)
expectations.evidence: Build was not executed — no build output or logs found in the run directory. Cannot verify build success. Marking as not verified/failed.
